title: Outlook email uploading to Oppurtunites
excerpt: when im working in Outlook i want to be able to upload relevant emails from clients directly to the sales oppurtunity in Monday.com how can this be done.?

posts.author: kieranwaterston (Kieran Waterston)
posts.cookedHtml: when im working in Outlook i want to be able to upload relevant emails from clients directly to the sales oppurtunity in Monday.com how can this be done.?

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kieran!
Welcome to the monday.com Community!

You can do this easily through the Emails & Activities function on the platform.

Alternatively, if you’re looking to have a little more control around what does/doesn’t get updated and where you can find the item’s unique email address that you can forward relevant communications to. You can find this in the updates section by clicking “Write updates via email”

image1519×665 32.3 KB

Let me know how you go!

posts.author: Renae-JTsCloud (Renae-upstream)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @kieranwaterston How did you go with this?
